archetype.name: Mortal Herald
archetype.note: This archetype offers Eternal Bane at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Eternal Bane
feat.text: Your life has made you a nexus for your deity’s vile power. You’re continuously surrounded by a bane spell, with a spell rank equal to half your level (rounded up). The radius is 15 feet, and you can’t increase it. You can Dismiss the spell; if you do, it returns automatically after 1 minute.

traits.name: Cleric
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the cleric class.

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
